PowerShell(Write-Host "Waiting for Docker daemon..."; $timeout = 60; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep 3; $elapsed += 3; $result = docker info 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Docker ready after ${elapsed}s"; break } else { Write-Host "..." } } while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\); if \($elapsed -ge $timeout\) { Write-Host "Timeout waiting for Docker" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "Waiting for Postgres healthcheck..."; $ok = $false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 2; $h = docker inspect --format="{{.State.Health.Status}}" setads-db-1 2>&1; if \($h -eq "healthy"\) { Write-Host "Postgres healthy!"; $ok = $true; break } else { Write-Host "Status: $h" } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Host "Postgres not healthy after 40s" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 0 } | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{N='StartTime';E={$_.StartTime.ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)}})

PowerShell(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\superadmin_django.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Host "---WORKER---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\superadmin_worker.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":300[0-9]\\s|:800[0-9]\\s|:600[0-9]\\s" | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split '\\s+'; $pid = $parts[-1]; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$\($parts[2]\) -> PID $pid \($\($proc.Name\)\)" })

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":3\\d\\d\\d\\s|:8\\d\\d\\d\\s" | ForEach-Object { $line = $_.ToString\(\).Trim\(\) -split '\\s+'; "$\($line[1]\) -> PID $\($line[4]\)" } | Sort-Object | Get-Unique)
